input.subject: Retirement Celebration for Bob Williams
input.body_text:
Dear Colleagues,

After 35 years of dedicated service, our dear friend and colleague Bob Williams is retiring!

Please join us for a celebration luncheon in his honor:

DATE: Thursday, February 26, 2026
TIME: 12:00 PM - 2:00 PM
PLACE: Ocean View Restaurant
       Private Dining Room
       500 Harbor Boulevard
       San Diego, CA 92101

Lunch will be provided. If you'd like to contribute to a group gift, please contact Nancy.

Kindly RSVP by February 19th to nancy.clark@company.com

Let's give Bob the send-off he deserves!

Warm regards,
Nancy Clark
Event Coordinator

events.title: Bob Williams' Retirement Celebration
events.location: Ocean View Restaurant, 500 Harbor Boulevard, San Diego, CA 92101
events.description: Retirement luncheon celebrating Bob Williams' 35 years of service
